top_findings.summary: The skill description requires installing a script from an external domain (https://canifi.com/skills/ynab/install.sh) and grants Claude browser automation control over a YNAB session via Playwright MCP. For a budget management skill, requesting permission to automate browser interactions and potentially access authentication credentials (even if "stored locally") is excessive when YNAB offers a dedicated, limited-scope API that could achieve the same functionality with proper OAuth. The skill should use YNAB's official API with token-based authentication instead of requiring browser automation capabilities.
